title: elaeocarpus biflorus
intro: Elaeocarpus biflorus, also known as the Pagoda Tree or Two-flowered Elaeocarpus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. The plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus biflorus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and act as an anti-cancer agent. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder, which can be administered orally or topically to harness its medicinal properties.
